name: intentcanvas
description: Visual-first planning, approval, and plan-versus-actual review for AI-assisted code changes.

interface.shortDescription: Review visual code plans before implementation
interface.longDescription: Turn proposed code changes into a structured, visual plan; approve modules before implementation; then compare the approved plan with the resulting code.
defaultPrompt: Create a visual plan for this change and wait for my approval.
Compare the approved plan with the implemented code.
